zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mar於1270年3月出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米時，她的父親Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar27歲，母親Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'40歲。她於大約1288年與Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年7月24日在英國蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Mar于1270年3月出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米时，她的父亲Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar27岁，母亲Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'40岁。她于大约1288年与Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年7月24日在英国苏格兰薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Gim, Wai, Fong, Hong, Man Chung, Moo, Mun, Quon, Wing, Yat, Bok, Chun.
Spanish, Portuguese, Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Catalan: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mar ‘sea’ (from Latin mare).
German: nickname from Middle High German mar(w) ‘tender, delicate’, or an altered form of Mahr, a topographic name from mar ‘lake, swamp, stagnant water’.

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mar was born in March 1270, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, was 27 and her mother, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', was 40. She married Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl about 1288, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 24 July 1326, in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mar est née en mars 1270, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl environ 1288, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 juillet 1326, à Golspie, Sutherland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mar im März 1270 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar 27 und ihre Mutter Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' 40. Sie hat um 1288 in Scotland Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Juli 1326 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Golspie, Sutherland, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mar è nata il nel marzo 1270 nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl circa 1288, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 luglio 1326, nel Golspie, Sutherland, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Marが1270年3月にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで生まれた時，父Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Marは27歳，母Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'は40歳であった。約1288年にスコットランドでSir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年7月24日にイギリススコットランドススエルランドゴルスパで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mar(이)가 1270년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 스컷랜드에서 Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 7월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 서덜랜드 골스피에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mar nasceu em março de 1270, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1288, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de julho de 1326, em Golspie, Sutherland, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mar родилась марта 1270 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl около 1288 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 июля 1326 г. в местности голспи, сутирланд, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Mar nació en marzo de 1270, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger', tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1288, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de julio de 1326, en Golspie, Sutherland, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
